user.title: Expiration hub
user.description: Continue to create the shared Expiration hub (calendar and master switch), then configure your first item.

item.title: Add an expiration item
item.description: Choose a name and day or hour mode. You will set the period and alert threshold on the next step.

data_description.name: A descriptive name for the item, e.g. Kitchen Sponge.
data_description.mode: Days: whole-day calendar events and day-based sensors. Hours: timed calendar event and hour-based sensors.

item_period.title: Period and alert
item_period.description: Set how long until expiration and when to show a warning.

data_description.days_max: Used in day mode — how many days until this item should be replaced or checked.
data_description.hours_max: Used in hour mode — total hours until due (e.g. 55).
data_description.alert_threshold: In day mode: days before due when status becomes warning. In hour mode: hours before due.

error.days_min_one: Days until expiration must be at least 1.
error.hours_min_one: Hours until expiration must be at least 1.
error.threshold_too_high: Alert threshold must be less than days until expiration.
error.threshold_hours_too_high: Alert threshold must be less than hours until expiration.

abort.already_configured: An item with this name is already configured.

init.title: Update Expiration Settings
init.description: Adjust mode, period, and alert threshold.

data_description.hours_max: Hour mode: total hours until due.
data_description.alert_threshold: Day mode: days before due. Hour mode: hours before due.

error.days_min_one: Days until expiration must be at least 1.
error.hours_min_one: Hours until expiration must be at least 1.
error.threshold_too_high: Alert threshold must be less than days until expiration.
error.threshold_hours_too_high: Alert threshold must be less than hours until expiration.
